title: Genome Similarity Workflow
description: EPI2ME workflow for genome similarity analysis using mentalist. Processes compressed genome assemblies (*.medaka.fasta.gz) and computes pairwise Jaccard similarity scores.

input.title: Input Options
input.description: Parameters for finding and handling input data for analysis.

input.title: Input Directory
input.help_text: Provide a flat directory containing compressed genome assemblies (*.medaka.fasta.gz). The workflow will uncompress files as needed, but will not overwrite existing *.medaka.fasta files.

output.title: Output Options
output.description: Parameters for saving and naming workflow outputs.

out_dir.description: Directory for output of all workflow results.

project_name.title: Project Name
project_name.description: Name for the analysis project, passed to mentalist.
project_name.help_text: This name is used by mentalist to label the analysis and appears in the output files.

advanced_options.title: Advanced Options
advanced_options.description: Advanced options for configuring processes inside the workflow.
advanced_options.help_text: These advanced options do not need to be changed for typical use, but allow fine tuning of workflows for users who want more control over the workflow.

resources.run_time: Variable depending on number of samples
